case_title: DOUGLAS O'CONNOR VS. ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO, A RELIGIOUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'CONNOR, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO, A RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATION SACRED HEART CATHEDRAL PREPARATORY, A RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATION CATHEDRAL OF ST. MARY OF THE ASSUMPTION, A RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATION BRADY, BROTHER CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL WALSH, MILTON MOMONO, JO ANN FREED, PHIL MOHUN, DENIS NOCETTI, RON RODRIGUEZ, ROCIO CORDILEONE, ARCHBISHOP SALVATORE JOSEPH DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-01-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-31-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-09-2023
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-01-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
